description: A noodle soup dish served with broth, noodles, and a range of toppings such as meat, egg, or vegetables.
preparation_steps: Build flavor with aromatics and liquid
Cook the main ingredients until balanced

health_advice.benefits: Can be comforting, hydrating, and nutrient-dense depending on broth and ingredients.
health_advice.risks: Some soups can become high in sodium, cream, or refined starch depending on the recipe.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Choose broth-forward versions and pair them with vegetables or lean protein when possible.

dietary_notes.note: The exact profile depends on broth and toppings
